chapter_title.ar: باب بِنَاءِ الْمَسَاجِدِ وَ مَا يُؤْخَذُ مِنْهَا وَ الْحَدَثِ فِيهَا مِنَ النَّوْمِ وَ غَيْرِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 48 – Construction of the Masjid, and what can be taken from it, and the breaking of the ablution inside it due to sleep or something else

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/244)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/244)
text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ مَنْ بَنَى مَسْجِداً بَنَى اللَّهُ لَهُ بَيْتاً فِي الْجَنَّةِ

قَالَ أَبُو عُبَيْدَةَ فَمَرَّ بِي أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فِي طَرِيقِ مَكَّةَ وَ قَدْ سَوَّيْتُ بِأَحْجَارٍ مَسْجِداً فَقُلْتُ لَهُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ نَرْجُو أَنْ يَكُونَ هَذَا مِنْ ذَلِكَ فَقَالَ نَعَمْ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hisham Bin Al Hakam, from Abu Ubeyda Al Haza’a who said,
‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘The constructs a Masjid, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> will Build for him a house in the Paradise’.

Abu Ubeyda (the narrator) said, ‘So I passed by Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> in a street of Makkah, and I had evened out a Masjid with the stoned, so I said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup>asws</sup>! We are hoping that this would happen to be from that’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hisham ibn al-Hakam from au ‘Ubaydah al-Hadhddha’ who has said the following: “I heard abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, say, ‘If one builds a Masjid, Allah builds for him a house in paradise.’ Abu ‘Ubaydah has said, ‘Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, once passed by on the way to Makkah and I had built a Masjid with stones and asked him, “I pray to Allah to keep my souls in the service of your cause , I hope this will be of those (houses in paradise).” He (the Imam) said, “Yes, it will be so.’””
